channel.title: Linguistics
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Linguistics

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Anna Puupponen, Gabrielle Hodge, Benjamin Anible, Juhana Salonen, Tuija Wainio, Jarkko Keränen, Doris Hernández, Tommi Jantunen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ling-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Clausal agreement on adverbs in Andi
item.description: Article by Anna Puupponen, Gabrielle Hodge, Benjamin Anible, Juhana Salonen, Tuija Wainio, Jarkko Keränen, Doris Hernández, Tommi Jantunen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ling-2022-0168

item.title: On analysing fragments: the case of No?
item.description: Article by Anna Puupponen, Gabrielle Hodge, Benjamin Anible, Juhana Salonen, Tuija Wainio, Jarkko Keränen, Doris Hernández, Tommi Jantunen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ling-2022-0096

item.title: Generic and vague uses of a second-person singular pronoun in an open-class person-reference system and speaker creativity in reported speech: the case of anata in Japanese
item.description: Article by Anna Puupponen, Gabrielle Hodge, Benjamin Anible, Juhana Salonen, Tuija Wainio, Jarkko Keränen, Doris Hernández, Tommi Jantunen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ling-2022-0041

item.title: Sequence, gaze, and modal semantics: modal verb selection in German permission inquiries
item.description: Article by Anna Puupponen, Gabrielle Hodge, Benjamin Anible, Juhana Salonen, Tuija Wainio, Jarkko Keränen, Doris Hernández, Tommi Jantunen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ling-2023-0017

item.title: Aspectual reduplication in Sign Language of the Netherlands: reconsidering phonological constraints and aspectual distinctions
item.description: Article by Anna Puupponen, Gabrielle Hodge, Benjamin Anible, Juhana Salonen, Tuija Wainio, Jarkko Keränen, Doris Hernández, Tommi Jantunen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ling-2022-0076

item.title: From LIKE/LOVE to habitual: the case of Mainland East and Southeast Asian languages
item.description: Article by Anna Puupponen, Gabrielle Hodge, Benjamin Anible, Juhana Salonen, Tuija Wainio, Jarkko Keränen, Doris Hernández, Tommi Jantunen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ling-2022-0201

item.title: Opening up Corpus FinSL: enriching corpus analysis with linguistic ethnography in a study of constructed action
item.description: Article by Anna Puupponen, Gabrielle Hodge, Benjamin Anible, Juhana Salonen, Tuija Wainio, Jarkko Keränen, Doris Hernández, Tommi Jantunen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ling-2023-0196
